formats.name: Instagram caption (short)
formats.description: 1–3 short paragraphs, optional line breaks; include a hook, value, and soft CTA; max ~2200 characters but prefer concise.

formats.name: LinkedIn post
formats.description: Professional hook, 3–6 short paragraphs or bullets, one clear takeaway, end with a question or CTA.

formats.name: X (Twitter) thread
formats.description: Number each tweet as 1/, 2/, etc. Each under 280 characters. Cohesive narrative across the thread.

formats.name: Carousel slide outline
formats.description: 5–10 slides: for each slide give Title + 1–2 bullet points of on-slide copy. No design notes unless essential.

tones.name: Authoritative & calm
tones.instructions: Confident expert voice, minimal hype, precise wording, no slang.

tones.name: Warm conversational
tones.instructions: Friendly Brazilian-Portuguese or English conversational feel (match output language); approachable, human, light humor only if it fits.

tones.name: Bold & punchy
tones.instructions: Short sentences, strong verbs, occasional contrast; still clear and credible.

article_formats.name: Pillar / cornerstone guide
article_formats.description: Long authoritative guide covering the topic end-to-end: problem framing, core concepts, frameworks, examples, pitfalls, and actionable takeaways. Aim for definitive coverage without fluff.

article_formats.name: How-to tutorial
article_formats.description: Clear numbered or phased steps, prerequisites, tools, troubleshooting tips, and a recap checklist. Assume a motivated reader implementing along the way.

article_formats.name: Deep listicle
article_formats.description: Numbered sections (e.g. 8–12 items). Each item: short headline, 2–4 paragraphs of substance, not one-line fluff. Connect items into a coherent narrative arc.

article_formats.name: Thought leadership
article_formats.description: Clear thesis, evidence and examples, counterarguments addressed, implications for the reader’s industry or role. Opinionated but fair; cite concepts and data where appropriate.

article_formats.name: News & trend analysis
article_formats.description: Context on what changed, why it matters, who is affected, short timeline, and practical implications. Avoid hype; separate facts from interpretation.

article_tones.name: Editorial & polished
article_tones.instructions: Magazine-quality prose: smooth transitions, varied sentence length, precise vocabulary. Professional and timeless.

article_tones.name: Friendly expert (EEAT)
article_tones.instructions: Warm, trustworthy specialist voice: explain jargon, use analogies sparingly, sound like a practitioner who teaches.

article_tones.name: Technical & precise
article_tones.instructions: Dense but readable accuracy for practitioners: define terms, prefer specificity over slogans, minimal flourish.

article_tones.name: Story-driven
article_tones.instructions: Open with a concrete scenario or narrative hook; weave examples through sections; land on clear lessons.

article_tones.name: Conversational SEO
article_tones.instructions: Natural question-and-answer rhythm, skimmable subheads, plain language, still substantive — optimized for readers first, search engines second.
